blocks.text: I will start by reading the `instructions.md` file to understand the assignment requirements.
I will start by examining the files that need to be implemented to understand their current state.
I will now examine `Rectangle.java` to identify where the implementation is needed.
I will also check `Ellipse.java` to see where its implementation is required.
I'll now examine `CompositeShape.java` to see what needs to be implemented.
I will also check `AShape.java` to confirm the structure and methods of the base class.
I will now implement `ASimpleShape.setColor(Color color)`.

input.instruction: Implement the setColor method to set the protected color field.

blocks.text: I will now implement `Rectangle.paint(Graphics g)` by setting the graphics color and drawing the filled rectangle.

input.instruction: Implement the paint method for Rectangle. It should set the Graphics object's color and then call fillRect.

blocks.text: I will now implement `Ellipse.paint(Graphics g)` by setting the graphics color and drawing the filled oval.

input.instruction: Implement the paint method for Ellipse. It should set the Graphics object's color and then call fillOval.

blocks.text: I will now implement the `setColor` and `paint` methods in `CompositeShape.java`, delegating the actions to `shape1` and `shape2`.

input.instruction: Implement setColor and paint methods for CompositeShape, delegating both to its children.

blocks.text: I have completed the implementation of all required methods and will now run the tests to verify correctness.
